paper_has_author.name: paper_has_author
paper_has_author.then: at least one Person is linked via `authored`
paper_has_author.description: every paper must have at least one author

paper_has_topic.name: paper_has_topic
paper_has_topic.then: it is linked to one or more Topic via `covers`
paper_has_topic.description: papers should be tagged with at least one topic

publish.name: publish
publish.subject: Person
publish.effect: the paper becomes citable and gains an `authored` edge from the publisher

cite.name: cite
cite.subject: Paper
cite.effect: a directed citation edge is established between the two papers
